prompt: Create a low-angle cinematic fashion portrait of a stylish young woman seated on a large matte geometric cube pedestal in a minimal studio. Use a solid golden-yellow seamless backdrop and matching yellow floor, with soft studio shadows. The camera is very low and close to the subject’s extended foot, using a wide-angle perspective so the foreground white sneaker appears oversized and dominant while the upper body recedes. The subject sits casually with one leg stretched toward the lens and the other knee raised, relaxed hand resting over the bent knee. Outfit: a premium oversized black varsity-style jacket with mustard-yellow panels, white stripe trim on collar, cuffs, sleeves and hem, snap buttons, and a collegiate letter patch on the chest; cream oversized wide-leg pants; white ribbed socks; clean white leather Nike-style low-top sneakers with laces and perforated toe box; simple white top underneath; small hoop earrings and a short necklace. Hair is dark, long, wavy, loosely tied back with strands falling around the face. The face should be deliberately anonymized/obscured with a smooth centered rectangular blur/mosaic patch while preserving the fashion pose. Lighting is polished editorial studio lighting, warm and high-end, with crisp fabric detail, realistic leather texture, shallow depth of field, slight foreground emphasis, vertical 2:3 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra objects.
